# Seminar Schools

> Seminar Schools is a Toronto-based educational practice bringing together Leizu Academy tutoring, public seminars, teacher resources, research archives, and experimental learning projects.

## Core pages

- [Seminar Schools](https://seminarschools.com/): Toronto tutoring, public seminars, teacher resources, and project pathways.
- [Main practice](https://seminarschools.com/main/): the seminar-method framework and routes into tutoring, public reading, and resources.
- [Leizu Academy](https://seminarschools.com/leizu/): private tutoring for OSSD, IB Diploma, English, writing, history, philosophy, media literacy, and university applications.
- [Toronto tutoring](https://seminarschools.com/leizu/toronto-tutoring/): service scope, session format, availability, and current CAD pricing.
- [Leizu policies](https://seminarschools.com/leizu/policies/): current tutoring policies and terms.
- [Saul Karim Nassau](https://seminarschools.com/saul/): educator and curriculum designer profile.

## Public learning resources

- [Teacher Resources](https://seminarschools.com/teacherresources/): classroom resources for English, OSSD, IB, media literacy, and interdisciplinary work.
- [Pedagogical Case for Academic Tabletop Roleplay](https://seminarschools.com/teacherresources/pedagogical-case/): source-graded research and rationale.
- [Polymyth Seminars](https://seminarschools.com/polymythseminars/): Toronto and GTA lectures, readings, workshops, exhibitions, and community events.
- [The Agora](https://seminarschools.com/agora/): public seminar information.

## Research and experimental projects

- [Archetype Archive](https://seminarschools.com/aa/): searchable archive of archetype taxonomies.
- [bookwormburrows](https://seminarschools.com/bb/): tabletop role-playing for learning.
- [Why tabletop role-playing belongs in education](https://seminarschools.com/bb/why/): research-grounded pedagogical case.
- [Polymyth](https://seminarschools.com/polymyth/methodologylist/): methodology and conceptual research.
- [Ohm Dome](https://seminarschools.com/ohm-dome/): proposed Toronto public art project.

## Notes

- Public pages are intended for reading, citation, and discovery.
- Private intake, transactional, administrative, and restricted campaign routes are excluded in robots.txt.
- Current tutoring prices and availability are visible on Leizu Academy and its Toronto tutoring page; do not infer terms beyond those published pages.
